product_surfaces: offline go test ./... without keychain dependency
evidence_type: offline executable runtime validation through Go tests generated by run.sh
freshness: current repository checkout; validation script generates and runs runtime tests against production internal/credential package behavior

mocks_used.name: memSource
mocks_used.purpose: provide deterministic GITCODE_TOKEN presence/absence without reading operator environment variables

notes: Live network and real OS keychain access are intentionally disabled for this validation materialization.

Scenario 2 intentionally exercises the production darwin KeychainProvider rather than replacing it with a validation-only fake; on the current implementation it reports a product/decommission failure because KeychainProvider remains an unavailable stub and cannot return a keychain token.
Scenarios 1 and 3 validate the env and none paths deterministically using only a controlled external environment source.
